# CimdCacheControl constructor

The HTTP caching directives an authorization server honours when caching a fetched CIMD document (spec §23.12, R-23.12-k).

```csharp
public CimdCacheControl(int? MaxAgeSeconds = null, bool NoStore = false)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| MaxAgeSeconds | `max-age` in seconds from `Cache-Control`, if any. |
| NoStore | `true` when `Cache-Control: no-store` (or `no-cache`) forbids caching. |
